Church Auditing Department Report, 2014 Presented by Kevin R. Jergensen Managing Director, Church Auditing Department To the First Presidency of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints Dear Brethren: As directed…
Be it known now unto the king, that, if this city be builded, and the walls set up again, then will they not pay toll, tribute, and custom, and so thou shalt endamage the revenue of the kings.
My fruit is better than gold, yea, than fine gold; and my revenue than choice silver.
In the house of the righteous is much treasure: but in the revenues of the wicked is trouble.
Better is a little with righteousness than great revenues without right.
They have sown wheat, but shall reap thorns: they have put themselves to pain, but shall not profit: and they shall be ashamed of your revenues because of the fierce anger of the Lord.
